prompt:
STYLE: a photorealistic LIFESTYLE PRODUCT SCENE with clean type and graphic-callout OVERLAYS on top. 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Editorial wellness-brand marketing aesthetic.

BACKGROUND SCENE (real photo): a soft warm flat-lay TOP-DOWN composition on a sun-warmed light-oak wood surface, golden afternoon natural light from the right side of the frame. Centered slightly off-axis: the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid, jar closed). Around the jar, artfully arranged in a loose grid: a small bunch of fresh sea moss fronds, a sliced burdock root, a few dandelion flowers and leaves, and a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES with another handful of cubes scattered casually around the dish. Real-photo cinematic feel with warm soft shadows and natural rim-light on the jar.

OVERLAYS — clean type and graphic elements composed ON TOP of the lifestyle photo:
  • TOP — large bold ALL-CAPS headline overlay in deep ink-black with a subtle white text-shadow: 'WHY GUMMIES?' (bold condensed display sans-serif). Smaller sub-headline beneath: 'The easiest way to take sea moss daily.'
  • Around the jar — six small tagline-pill overlays in a loose constellation (NOT overlapping the jar). Each pill is a small white-fill rounded rectangle with a thin teal outline containing a tiny flat teal icon and a bold ALL-CAPS short label:
     – upper-left: SMILE icon + 'NO FISHY TASTE'
     – upper-right: SUITCASE icon + 'TRAVEL FRIENDLY'
     – middle-left: CLOCK icon + 'NO PREP NEEDED'
     – middle-right: SMILEY icon + 'KIDS APPROVED'
     – lower-left: LEAF icon + 'PLANT BASED'
     – lower-right: CALENDAR icon + '60 GUMMIES · 30 DAYS'
  Thin gold dotted connector lines from a few pills toward the jar.
  • BOTTOM — small tagline overlay: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE' in tracked light-gray all-caps.

DESIGN SYSTEM (for overlays): muted TEAL/CYAN + warm GOLD/YELLOW + deep INK-BLACK type · bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif headlines, clean modern sans-serif body · NO script fonts · tiny flat outlined teal icons · overlay elements composed on top of the real photograph.

ABSOLUTE RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 square 4K · realistic lifestyle photo background, NOT flat white · NO border/frame · reference image for jar appearance.
